title: Mage - Serenity
description: Experience Minecraft like back in the legacy version of the game
body:
![Serenity](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c0a47ed42441b9aa008a8096ac824a76568e27b9_0.webp)
# Experience Minecraft Like Back Then
Serenity is a kind of time machine modpack, it has its game version set to 1.21.1, but has old features from back in the legacy console days, now you can truly experience the old feel of Minecraft, without loosing the new features! Oh, and talking about features, look what the modpack has!

![Features:](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/841cc865411c9380c35bdd7a8aeb0860eca9e033_0.webp)

## FEATURES
- The old tutorial world is back!
- The flight speed has been increased!
- Controller Support!
- Autosave feature!
- Legacy skins!
- Performant!



## Permissions
YOU ARE ALLOWED TO DISTRIBUTE THE PACK VIA A LINK TO THIS PAGE, AlSO YOU ARE ABLE TO MAKE CONTENT ABOUT THE PACK, YOU ARE NOT ALLOWED TO DISTRIBUTE THE PACK OTHERWISE AND MAKE PROFIT OFF IT
